
```{r}
# ICI$ICI[[2]]
```

### Discriminación del modelo

En general, los modelos tuvieron buena discriminación [Table 2].

#### C-index y C/D AUC tiempo dependiente

En población con estadios 3a-3b-4, el estadístico C fue de 0.853 para discriminar falla renal a 2 años y ligeramente menor para 5 años: 0.827. Valores similares fueron reportados para la población con estadios 3b-4. Consistentemente, las áreas bajo la curva ROC tiempo-dependientes (C/D AUC) tuvieron valores similares para discriminar a 2 y 5 años.

```{r}
#| label: c-index
#| warning: false
#| message: false

B <- 100

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na() %>%  
  mutate(status = factor(eventd5y, 
                         levels = c(0, 1, 2), 
                         labels = c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Death w/o Kidney Failure")), 
         status_num = eventd5y)

primary_event <- 1

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Validation set
C_vdata <- pec::cindex(
  object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, eventd5y) ~ 1,
  cause = primary_event,
  eval.times = horizon,
  data = vdata
)$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox

# Bootstraping C-index to calculate the bootstrap percentile confidence intervals
set.seed(777)

C_boot <- function(B, data) {
  cstat <- c()
  n <- nrow(data)
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, TRUE)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    
    pec::cindex(
    object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = as.matrix(data_boot$pred)),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cause = primary_event,
    eval.times = horizon,
    data = data_boot
    )$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox -> cstat[i]
  }
  return(cstat)
}
set.seed(777)
C_vdata_boot <- C_boot(B = B, data = vdata)

# Time-dependent AUC ---------

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

alpha <- .05
k <- 3
res_discr_csh <- matrix(c(
  ## C-index
  # Validation CSH1
  C_vdata,
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2),

  ## Time-dependent AUC
  # Validation CSH1
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC - qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC + qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se
  ),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3, byrow = T,
  dimnames = list(
  c("C-index, Stages 3b-4, 2 year", "Time dependent AUC, Stages 3b-4, 2 year"),
  c("Estimate", "Lower .95", "Upper .95")
  )
  )

res_discr_csh2b <- round(res_discr_csh, k)

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na() %>%  
  mutate(status = factor(eventd5y, 
                         levels = c(0, 1, 2), 
                         labels = c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Death w/o Kidney Failure")), 
         status_num = eventd5y)

primary_event <- 1

# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Validation set
C_vdata <- pec::cindex(
  object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, eventd5y) ~ 1,
  cause = primary_event,
  eval.times = horizon,
  data = vdata
)$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox

# Bootstraping C-index to calculate the bootstrap percentile confidence intervals
set.seed(777)

C_boot <- function(B, data) {
  cstat <- c()
  n <- nrow(data)
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, TRUE)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    
    pec::cindex(
    object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = as.matrix(data_boot$pred)),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cause = primary_event,
    eval.times = horizon,
    data = data_boot
    )$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox -> cstat[i]
  }
  return(cstat)
}
set.seed(777)
C_vdata_boot <- C_boot(B = B, data = vdata)

# Time-dependent AUC ---------

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

alpha <- .05
k <- 3
res_discr_csh <- matrix(c(
  ## C-index
  # Validation CSH1
  C_vdata,
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2),

  ## Time-dependent AUC
  # Validation CSH1
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC - qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC + qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se
  ),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3, byrow = T,
  dimnames = list(
  c("C-index, Stages 3b-4, 5 year", "Time dependent AUC, Stages 3b-4, 5 year"),
  c("Estimate", "Lower .95", "Upper .95")
  )
  )

res_discr_csh5b <- round(res_discr_csh, k)

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na() %>%  
  mutate(status = factor(eventd5y, 
                         levels = c(0, 1, 2), 
                         labels = c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Death w/o Kidney Failure")), 
         status_num = eventd5y)

primary_event <- 1

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Validation set
C_vdata <- pec::cindex(
  object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, eventd5y) ~ 1,
  cause = primary_event,
  eval.times = horizon,
  data = vdata
)$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox

# Bootstraping C-index to calculate the bootstrap percentile confidence intervals
set.seed(777)

C_boot <- function(B, data) {
  cstat <- c()
  n <- nrow(data)
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, TRUE)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    
    pec::cindex(
    object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = as.matrix(data_boot$pred)),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cause = primary_event,
    eval.times = horizon,
    data = data_boot
    )$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox -> cstat[i]
  }
  return(cstat)
}

set.seed(777)
C_vdata_boot <- C_boot(B = B, data = vdata)

# Time-dependent AUC ---------

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

alpha <- .05
k <- 3
res_discr_csh <- matrix(c(
  ## C-index
  # Validation CSH1
  C_vdata,
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2),

  ## Time-dependent AUC
  # Validation CSH1
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC - qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC + qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se
  ),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3, byrow = T,
  dimnames = list(
  c("C-index, Stages 3-4, 2 year", "Time dependent AUC, Stages 3-4, 2 year"),
  c("Estimate", "Lower .95", "Upper .95")
  )
  )

res_discr_csh2a <- round(res_discr_csh, k)

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na() %>%  
  mutate(status = factor(eventd5y, 
                         levels = c(0, 1, 2), 
                         labels = c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Kidney Failure", 
                                    "Death w/o Kidney Failure")), 
         status_num = eventd5y)

primary_event <- 1

# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Validation set
C_vdata <- pec::cindex(
  object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, eventd5y) ~ 1,
  cause = primary_event,
  eval.times = horizon,
  data = vdata
)$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox

# Bootstraping C-index to calculate the bootstrap percentile confidence intervals

set.seed(777)

C_boot <- function(B, data) {
  cstat <- c()
  n <- nrow(data)
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, TRUE)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    
    pec::cindex(
    object = list("CauseSpecificCox" = as.matrix(data_boot$pred)),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cause = primary_event,
    eval.times = horizon,
    data = data_boot
    )$AppCindex$CauseSpecificCox -> cstat[i]
  }
  return(cstat)
}

set.seed(777)
C_vdata_boot <- C_boot(B = B, data = vdata)

# Time-dependent AUC ---------

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

alpha <- .05
k <- 3
res_discr_csh <- matrix(c(
  ## C-index
  # Validation CSH1
  C_vdata,
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(C_vdata_boot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2),

  ## Time-dependent AUC
  # Validation CSH1
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC - qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se,
  score_vdata$AUC$score$AUC + qnorm(1 - alpha / 2) * score_vdata$AUC$score$se
  ),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3, byrow = T,
  dimnames = list(
  c("C-index, Stages 3-4, 5 year", "Time dependent AUC, Stages 3-4, 5 year"),
  c("Estimate", "Lower .95", "Upper .95")
  )
  )

res_discr_csh5a <- round(res_discr_csh, k)
```

#### D statistic y R<sup>2</sup><sub>D</sub> de Royston-Sauerbrei

El estadístico D y su versión transformada para mejorar interpretabilidad: $R^2_D$ indicaron buena discriminación. Especialmente, el $R^2_D$ puede interpretarse como la varianza explicada del modelo. En todos los horizontes temporales (2 años y 5 años) y subpoblaciones (3a-3b-4 y 3b-4) se apreció que el modelo explicaba más del 53% de la varibabilida de los datos de validación externa.

```{r}
#| label: royston-d2

# function to calculate D and R2D
source("Code/R/roystonD.R")

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3-4----
group <- c("Stages 3-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time2y, time5y, eventd2y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na() 

primary_event <- 1

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Rank based on predicted values at 2 years
vdata$rank <- rank(vdata$pred,
  na.last = TRUE,
  ties.method = "first"
)

res_vdata <- royston_R2D_cmprsk(
  pred = vdata$pred,
  data = vdata,
  primary_event = 1,
  time = vdata$time2y,
  status = vdata$eventd2y
)

k <- 2
res_D <- rbind(
  "Stages 3-4, 2 year" = res_vdata
  )

res_D2a <- round(res_D, k)

# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Rank based on predicted values at 5 years
vdata$rank <- rank(vdata$pred,
  na.last = TRUE,
  ties.method = "first"
)

res_vdata <- royston_R2D_cmprsk(
  pred = vdata$pred,
  data = vdata,
  primary_event = 1,
  time = vdata$time5y,
  status = vdata$eventd5y
)

k <- 2
res_D <- rbind(
  "Stages 3-4, 5 year" = res_vdata
  )

res_D5a <- round(res_D, k)

 # Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y, time2y, eventd2y) %>%  
  drop_na()

primary_event <- 1

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Rank based on predicted values at 2 years

vdata$rank <- rank(vdata$pred,
  na.last = TRUE,
  ties.method = "first"
)

res_vdata <- royston_R2D_cmprsk(
  pred = vdata$pred,
  data = vdata,
  primary_event = 1,
  time = vdata$time2y,
  status = vdata$eventd2y
)

k <- 2
res_D <- rbind(
  "Stages 3b-4, 2 year" = res_vdata
  )

res_D2b <- round(res_D, k)

# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

# Rank based on predicted values at 5 years

vdata$rank <- rank(vdata$pred,
  na.last = TRUE,
  ties.method = "first"
)

res_vdata <- royston_R2D_cmprsk(
  pred = vdata$pred,
  data = vdata,
  primary_event = 1,
  time = vdata$time5y,
  status = vdata$eventd5y
)

k <- 2
res_D <- rbind(
  "Stages 3b-4, 5 year" = res_vdata
  )

res_D5b <- round(res_D, k)
```

### Rendimiento global del modelo

```{r}
#| label: overall-error
#| output: false

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3-4----
nboot <- 100
group <- c("Stages 3-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time2y, time5y, eventd2y, eventd5y) %>%  
  mutate(status_num = eventd5y) %>% 
  drop_na() 

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = vdata$pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
  summary = c("ipa"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

# Bootstrapping data
score_boot <- function(B, data) {
  n <- nrow(data)
  ipa <- c()
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, T)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    Score(
    list("csh_validation" = data_boot$pred),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cens.model = "km",
    data = data_boot,
    conf.int = TRUE,
    times = horizon,
    metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
    summary = c("ipa"),
    cause = primary_event,
    plots = "calibration"
    ) -> scor
    ipa[i] <- scor[["Brier"]][["score"]][["IPA"]][[2]]
    cat(".")
  }
  return(ipa)
}

set.seed(12314)
score_boot(B = nboot, data = vdata) -> vboot

# Table overall measures
alpha <- .05
k <- 2 # number of digits
res_ov_csh <- matrix(unlist(c(

  # Brier score - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$Brier,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$lower,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$upper,

  # IPA - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$IPA,
  quantile(vboot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(vboot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2)
  )),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3,
  byrow = T,
  dimnames =
  list(
    c("Brier, Stages 3-4, 2 year", "Scaled Brier, Stages 3-4, 2 year"),
    c("Estimate", "Lower .95 ", "Upper .95")
    )
  )

res_ov2a <- round(res_ov_csh, 3) # Digits

# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = vdata$pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
  summary = c("ipa"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

# Bootstrapping data
score_boot <- function(B, data) {
  n <- nrow(data)
  ipa <- c()
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, T)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    Score(
    list("csh_validation" = data_boot$pred),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cens.model = "km",
    data = data_boot,
    conf.int = TRUE,
    times = horizon,
    metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
    summary = c("ipa"),
    cause = primary_event,
    plots = "calibration"
    ) -> scor
    ipa[i] <- scor[["Brier"]][["score"]][["IPA"]][[2]]
    cat(".")
  }
  return(ipa)
}

set.seed(12314)
score_boot(B = nboot, data = vdata) -> vboot

# Table overall measures
alpha <- .05
k <- 2 # number of digits
res_ov_csh <- matrix(unlist(c(

  # Brier score - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$Brier,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$lower,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$upper,

  # IPA - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$IPA,
  quantile(vboot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(vboot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2)
  )),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3,
  byrow = T,
  dimnames =
  list(
    c("Brier, Stages 3-4, 5 year", "Scaled Brier, Stages 3-4, 5 year"),
    c("Estimate", "Lower .95 ", "Upper .95")
    )
  )

res_ov5a <- round(res_ov_csh, 3) # Digits

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time2y, time5y, eventd2y, eventd5y) %>%  
  mutate(status_num = eventd5y) %>% 
  drop_na() 

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = vdata$pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
  summary = c("ipa"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

# Bootstrapping data
score_boot <- function(B, data) {
  n <- nrow(data)
  ipa <- c()
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, T)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    Score(
    list("csh_validation" = data_boot$pred),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cens.model = "km",
    data = data_boot,
    conf.int = TRUE,
    times = horizon,
    metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
    summary = c("ipa"),
    cause = primary_event,
    plots = "calibration"
    ) -> scor
    ipa[i] <- scor[["Brier"]][["score"]][["IPA"]][[2]]
    cat(".")
  }
  return(ipa)
}

set.seed(12314)
score_boot(B = nboot, data = vdata) -> vboot

# Table overall measures
alpha <- .05
k <- 2 # number of digits
res_ov_csh <- matrix(unlist(c(

  # Brier score - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$Brier,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$lower,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$upper,

  # IPA - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$IPA,
  quantile(vboot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(vboot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2)
  )),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3,
  byrow = T,
  dimnames =
  list(
    c("Brier, Stages 3b-4, 2 year", "Scaled Brier, Stages 3b-4, 2 year"),
    c("Estimate", "Lower .95 ", "Upper .95")
    )
  )

res_ov2b <- round(res_ov_csh, 3) # Digits

# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

# Validation data
score_vdata <- Score(
  list("csh_validation" = vdata$pred),
  formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
  cens.model = "km",
  data = vdata,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  times = horizon,
  metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
  summary = c("ipa"),
  cause = primary_event,
  plots = "calibration"
)

# Bootstrapping data
score_boot <- function(B, data) {
  n <- nrow(data)
  ipa <- c()
  for (i in 1:B) {
    ids <- sample(1:n, n, T)
    data_boot <- data[ids, ]
    Score(
    list("csh_validation" = data_boot$pred),
    formula = Hist(time5y, status_num) ~ 1,
    cens.model = "km",
    data = data_boot,
    conf.int = TRUE,
    times = horizon,
    metrics = c("auc", "brier"),
    summary = c("ipa"),
    cause = primary_event,
    plots = "calibration"
    ) -> scor
    ipa[i] <- scor[["Brier"]][["score"]][["IPA"]][[2]]
    cat(".")
  }
  return(ipa)
}

set.seed(12314)
score_boot(B = nboot, data = vdata) -> vboot

# Table overall measures
alpha <- .05
k <- 2 # number of digits
res_ov_csh <- matrix(unlist(c(

  # Brier score - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$Brier,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$lower,
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$upper,

  # IPA - external validation
  score_vdata$Brier$score[model == "csh_validation"]$IPA,
  quantile(vboot, probs = alpha / 2),
  quantile(vboot, probs = 1 - alpha / 2)
  )),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 3,
  byrow = T,
  dimnames =
  list(
    c("Brier, Stages 3b-4, 5 year", "Scaled Brier, Stages 3b-4, 5 year"),
    c("Estimate", "Lower .95 ", "Upper .95")
    )
  )

res_ov5b <- round(res_ov_csh, 3) # Digits
```

```{r}
#| label: table-performance-final
#| output: false

# Average predicted risk
avg_pred <- cbind("metrica" = "Average predicted risk", 
                 avg_pred2a, 
                 avg_pred5a, 
                 avg_pred2b, 
                 avg_pred5b)

colnames(avg_pred) <- c("metrica", "est2ya", "est5ya", "est2yb", "est5yb")

avg_pred %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{est2ya}%")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{est5ya}%")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{est2yb}%")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{est5yb}%"))   
  ) -> avg_pred; avg_pred

# Average observed proportion
avg_obs <- cbind("metrica" = "Average observed proportion (95% CI)", 
                 avg_obs2a, 
                 avg_obs5a, 
                 avg_obs2b, 
                 avg_obs5b)

colnames(avg_obs) <- c("metrica", "OE2a", "ll2a", "ul2a", 
                          "OE5a", "ll5a", "ul5a", 
                          "OE2b", "ll2b", "ul2b", 
                          "OE5b", "ll5b", "ul5b")
avg_obs %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a}% ({ll2a}% to {ul2a}%)")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a}% ({ll5a}% to {ul5a}%)")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b}% ({ll2b}% to {ul2b}%)")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b}% ({ll5b}% to {ul5b}%)"))   
  ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est")) -> avg_obs; avg_obs

# OE summary
OE_summary <- cbind("metrica" = "O/E ratio (95% CI)", 
                    OE_summary2a, 
                    OE_summary5a, 
                    OE_summary2b, 
                    OE_summary5b); OE_summary

colnames(OE_summary) <- c("metrica", "OE2a", "ll2a", "ul2a", 
                         "OE5a", "ll5a", "ul5a", 
                         "OE2b", "ll2b", "ul2b", 
                         "OE5b", "ll5b", "ul5b")

OE_summary %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a} ({ll2a} to {ul2a})")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a} ({ll5a} to {ul5a})")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b} ({ll2b} to {ul2b})")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b} ({ll5b} to {ul5b})"))   
    ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est")) -> OE_summary; OE_summary

# Calibration slope e intercept
res_cal <- cbind("metrica" = c("Calibration intercept (95% CI)", " Calibration slope (95% CI)"), 
                 res_cal2a, 
                 res_cal5a, 
                 res_cal2b, 
                 res_cal5b); res_cal

colnames(res_cal) <- c("metrica", "OE2a", "ll2a", "ul2a", 
                       "OE5a", "ll5a", "ul5a", 
                       "OE2b", "ll2b", "ul2b", 
                       "OE5b", "ll5b", "ul5b")
res_cal <- 
  res_cal %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a} ({ll2a} to {ul2a})")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a} ({ll5a} to {ul5a})")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b} ({ll2b} to {ul2b})")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b} ({ll5b} to {ul5b})"))   
  ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est")) 

rbind(avg_pred, avg_obs, OE_summary, res_cal) -> table_performance; table_performance

# C-index y C/D AUC
res_discr_csh <- cbind("metrica" = c("C-index up to t-years (95% CI)", " C/D AUC, at t years (95% CI)"), 
                 res_discr_csh2a, 
                 res_discr_csh5a, 
                 res_discr_csh2b, 
                 res_discr_csh5b); res_discr_csh

colnames(res_discr_csh) <- c("metrica", "OE2a", "ll2a", "ul2a", 
                       "OE5a", "ll5a", "ul5a", 
                       "OE2b", "ll2b", "ul2b", 
                       "OE5b", "ll5b", "ul5b")
res_discr_csh <- 
  res_discr_csh %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a} ({ll2a} to {ul2a})")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a} ({ll5a} to {ul5a})")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b} ({ll2b} to {ul2b})")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b} ({ll5b} to {ul5b})"))   
  ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est")) 

# D-statistic y R2D
res_D <- cbind("metrica" = "D statistic (95% CI)", 
               as.matrix(t(res_D2a[, -4])), 
               as.matrix(t(res_D5a[, -4])), 
               as.matrix(t(res_D2b[, -4])), 
               as.matrix(t(res_D5b[, -4]))); res_D

colnames(res_D) <- c("metrica", "OE2a", "ll2a", "ul2a",
                             "OE5a", "ll5a", "ul5a",  
                             "OE2b", "ll2b", "ul2b",
                             "OE5b", "ll5b", "ul5b")
res_D <- 
  res_D %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a} ({ll2a} to {ul2a})")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a} ({ll5a} to {ul5a})")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b} ({ll2b} to {ul2b})")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b} ({ll5b} to {ul5b})"))   
  ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est")) 

res_D2 <- cbind("metrica" = "R2D", 
                res_D2a[4] * 100, 
                res_D5a[4] * 100, 
                res_D2b[4] * 100, 
                res_D5b[4] * 100)

colnames(res_D2) <- c("metrica", "est2ya", "est5ya", "est2yb", "est5yb")

res_D2 %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{est2ya}%")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{est5ya}%")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{est2yb}%")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{est5yb}%"))   
  ) -> res_D2; res_D2

# Brier score
res_ov <- cbind("metrica" = c("Brier score (95% CI)", "Scaled Brier score (95% CI)"), 
                res_ov2a * c(1, 100), 
                res_ov5a * c(1, 100), 
                res_ov2b * c(1, 100), 
                res_ov5b * c(1, 100)); res_ov

colnames(res_ov) <- c("metrica", "OE2a", "ll2a", "ul2a", 
                             "OE5a", "ll5a", "ul5a", 
                             "OE2b", "ll2b", "ul2b", 
                             "OE5b", "ll5b", "ul5b")
res_ov1 <- 
  res_ov %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  filter(metrica == "Brier score (95% CI)") %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a} ({ll2a} to {ul2a})")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a} ({ll5a} to {ul5a})")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b} ({ll2b} to {ul2b})")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b} ({ll5b} to {ul5b})"))   
  ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est"))  

res_ov2 <- 
  res_ov %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  filter(metrica == "Scaled Brier score (95% CI)") %>% 
  mutate(
    est2ya = as.character(glue("{OE2a}% ({ll2a}% to {ul2a}%)")), 
    est5ya = as.character(glue("{OE5a}% ({ll5a}% to {ul5a}%)")),
    est2yb = as.character(glue("{OE2b}% ({ll2b}% to {ul2b}%)")),
    est5yb = as.character(glue("{OE5b}% ({ll5b}% to {ul5b}%)"))   
  ) %>% 
  select(metrica, starts_with("est"))  

res_ov <- rbind(res_ov1, res_ov2); res_ov


rbind(avg_pred, avg_obs, OE_summary, res_cal, res_discr_csh, res_D, res_D2, 
      res_ov) -> table_performance; table_performance

table_performance %>% 
  mutate(grupo = c(rep("Calibration", 5), rep("Discrimination", 4), rep("Overall prediction error", 2))) %>% 
  relocate(grupo, .before = "metrica") %>%
  bind_rows() %>% 
  as_grouped_data(groups = "grupo") %>% 
  flextable::as_flextable(hide_grouplabel = TRUE)  %>%
  set_header_labels(
    metrica = "Validation aspect and performance measure", 
    est2ya = "t = 2 year", 
    est5ya = "t = 5 year", 
    est2yb = "t = 2 year", 
    est5yb = "t = 5 year" 
  ) %>% 
  add_header_row(
    values = c("Validation aspect and performance measure", "CKD Stages 3a-3b-4", "CKD Stages 3b-4"), 
    colwidths = c(1, 2, 2)
  ) %>% 
  merge_v(j = 1, part = "header") %>% 
  bold(i = c(1, 7, 12)) %>% 
  autofit()  %>% 
  set_caption("Table 2. Performance measures of KFRE in the external dataset of patients with CKD Stages 3a-4 and 3b-4") %>% 
  theme_booktabs() %>%  
  bold(bold = TRUE, part = "header")  -> table_perf_final

table_perf_final %>% 
  flextable::save_as_docx(path = "Tables/Table2.docx")
```

### Table 2

```{r}
#| label: table-perf-final
table_perf_final
```

## Evaluación de utilidad del modelo predictivo

```{r}
#| label: decision-curve
#| fig.align: center
#| fig-cap: "Decision curve analysis"

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3-4----
group <- c("Stages 3-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time2y, time5y, eventd2y, eventd5y) %>%  
  mutate(status_num = eventd5y) %>% 
  drop_na() 

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

vdata %>% 
  mutate(
    eventd5y = factor(eventd5y)
  ) -> vdata_dca

dca(
  Surv(time5y, eventd5y) ~ pred, 
  data = vdata_dca, 
  time = horizon, 
  thresholds = seq(0, 0.5, 0.01), 
  label = list(pred = "Prob. of kidney failure within 2 years")
  ) -> dca1 

dca1 %>% 
  plot(smooth = TRUE)  + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") -> p1


# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

vdata %>% 
  mutate(
    eventd5y = factor(eventd5y)
  ) -> vdata_dca

dca(
  Surv(time5y, eventd5y) ~ pred, 
  data = vdata_dca, 
  time = horizon, 
  thresholds = seq(0, 0.5, 0.01), 
  label = list(pred = "Prob. of kidney failure within 5 years")
  ) -> dca2 

dca2 %>% 
  plot(smooth = TRUE) + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") -> p2

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3b-4----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time2y, time5y, eventd2y, eventd5y) %>%  
  mutate(status_num = eventd5y) %>% 
  drop_na() 

# A 2 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
horizon <- 2 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

vdata %>% 
  mutate(
    eventd5y = factor(eventd5y)
  ) -> vdata_dca

dca(
  Surv(time5y, eventd5y) ~ pred, 
  data = vdata_dca, 
  time = horizon, 
  thresholds = seq(0, 0.5, 0.01), 
  label = list(pred = "Prob. of kidney failure within 2 years")
  ) -> dca3 

dca3 %>% 
  plot(smooth = TRUE)  + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")  -> p3


# A 5 años----
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
horizon <- 5 
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)

primary_event <- 1

vdata %>% 
  mutate(
    eventd5y = factor(eventd5y)
  ) -> vdata_dca

dca(
  Surv(time5y, eventd5y) ~ pred, 
  data = vdata_dca, 
  time = horizon, 
  thresholds = seq(0, 0.5, 0.01), 
  label = list(pred = "Prob. of kidney failure within 5 years")
  ) -> dca4 

dca4 %>% 
  plot(smooth = TRUE) + 
  theme_bw()  + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") -> p4
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-utility
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig.align: center
#| fig-cap: "Decision curves analysis"
p1a <- p1 + 
  labs(title = "CKD Stages 3a-3b-4") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
p3a <- p3 + labs(title = "CKD Stages 3b-4") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

(p1a / p2) | (p3a / p4) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') -> plot_decision_curve

ggsave(filename = "plot_decision_curve.png", 
       device = "png", 
       plot = plot_decision_curve, 
       path = "Figures", 
       width = 10,
       height = 10, 
       dpi = 300)

(p1 / p2) | (p3 / p4)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
dca1 %>% 
  as_tibble() -> data_net_dca1
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
dca2 %>% 
  as_tibble()
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
test_consequences(
  Surv(time5y, eventd5y) ~ pred, 
  data = vdata_dca,
  statistics = c("pos_rate", "neg_rate", "test_pos_rate", "test_neg_rate", "tp_rate",
    "fp_rate", "fn_rate", "tn_rate", "ppv", "npv", "sens", "spec", "lr_pos", "lr_neg"),
  time = horizon, 
  thresholds = seq(0, 0.5, 0.01), 
  label = list(pred = "Prob. of kidney failure within 5 years")
  )
```

## Análisis de sensibilidad

### Curvas de calibración usando método de hazards subdistribucionales

Cuando se utiliza otro enfoque de análisis, el método de hazards subdistribucionales, los gráficos de calibración revelan una mayor sobreestimación del riesgo de falla renal en comparación con los gráficos obtenidos mediante el método de pseusovalores (Ver @fig-subhazard-plot).

```{r}
#| label: fig-subhazard-plot
#| fig.width: 7
#| fig.height: 14
#| fig.align: center
#| fig-cap: "Cumulative incidence curves of the observed outcome probabilities in the population study for kidney failure or deathd without kidney failure"

# Calibration plot (flexible regression approach) -------------------------

library(survival)
library(riskRegression)

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 3-5----
group <- c("Stages 3-4")

# Creacion de datsets para IA a 5 y 2 años
data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na()

primary_event <- 1

# A 2 años----
horizon <- 2

# Add estimated risk and complementary log-log of it to dataset
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)
vdata$cll_pred <- log(-log(1 - pred))

# 5 knots seems to give somewhat equivalent graph to pseudo method with bw = 0.05
n_internal_knots <- 5 # Austin et al. advise to use between 3 (more smoothing, less flexible) and 5 (less smoothing, more flexible)
rcs_vdata <- ns(vdata$cll_pred, df = n_internal_knots + 1)
colnames(rcs_vdata) <- paste0("basisf_", colnames(rcs_vdata))
vdata_bis <- cbind.data.frame(vdata, rcs_vdata)

# Use subdistribution hazards (Fine-Gray) model
form_fgr <- reformulate(
  termlabels = colnames(rcs_vdata),
  response = "Hist(time5y, eventd5y)"
)

# Regress subdistribution of event of interest on cloglog of estimated risks
calib_fgr <- FGR(
  formula = form_fgr,
  cause = primary_event,
  data = vdata_bis
)

# Add observed and predicted together in a data frame
dat_fgr <- cbind.data.frame(
  "obs" = predict(calib_fgr, times = horizon, newdata = vdata_bis),
  "pred" = vdata$pred
)

# Calibration plot
dat_fgr2 <- dat_fgr[order(dat_fgr$pred), ]

# A 5 años----
horizon <- 5

# Add estimated risk and complementary log-log of it to dataset
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)
vdata$cll_pred <- log(-log(1 - pred))

# 5 knots seems to give somewhat equivalent graph to pseudo method with bw = 0.05
n_internal_knots <- 5 # Austin et al. advise to use between 3 (more smoothing, less flexible) and 5 (less smoothing, more flexible)
rcs_vdata <- ns(vdata$cll_pred, df = n_internal_knots + 1)
colnames(rcs_vdata) <- paste0("basisf_", colnames(rcs_vdata))
vdata_bis <- cbind.data.frame(vdata, rcs_vdata)

# Use subdistribution hazards (Fine-Gray) model
form_fgr <- reformulate(
  termlabels = colnames(rcs_vdata),
  response = "Hist(time5y, eventd5y)"
)

# Regress subdistribution of event of interest on cloglog of estimated risks
calib_fgr <- FGR(
  formula = form_fgr,
  cause = primary_event,
  data = vdata_bis
)

# Add observed and predicted together in a data frame
dat_fgr <- cbind.data.frame(
  "obs" = predict(calib_fgr, times = horizon, newdata = vdata_bis),
  "pred" = vdata$pred
)

# Calibration plot
dat_fgr5 <- dat_fgr[order(dat_fgr$pred), ]

# Seleccion del grupo: Stages 4-5----
group <- c("Stages 3b-4")

# Creacion de datsets para IA a 5 y 2 años
data %>% 
  filter(ckd_stage2 == group) -> data_filt

vdata <- data_filt %>% 
  select(id, risk2y, risk5y, time5y, eventd5y) %>%  
  drop_na()

primary_event <- 1

# A 2 años----
horizon <- 2

# Add estimated risk and complementary log-log of it to dataset
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk2y
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)
vdata$cll_pred <- log(-log(1 - pred))

# 5 knots seems to give somewhat equivalent graph to pseudo method with bw = 0.05
n_internal_knots <- 5 # Austin et al. advise to use between 3 (more smoothing, less flexible) and 5 (less smoothing, more flexible)
rcs_vdata <- ns(vdata$cll_pred, df = n_internal_knots + 1)
colnames(rcs_vdata) <- paste0("basisf_", colnames(rcs_vdata))
vdata_bis <- cbind.data.frame(vdata, rcs_vdata)

# Use subdistribution hazards (Fine-Gray) model
form_fgr <- reformulate(
  termlabels = colnames(rcs_vdata),
  response = "Hist(time5y, eventd5y)"
)

# Regress subdistribution of event of interest on cloglog of estimated risks
calib_fgr <- FGR(
  formula = form_fgr,
  cause = primary_event,
  data = vdata_bis
)

# Add observed and predicted together in a data frame
dat_fgr <- cbind.data.frame(
  "obs" = predict(calib_fgr, times = horizon, newdata = vdata_bis),
  "pred" = vdata$pred
)

# Calibration plot
dat_fgr2b <- dat_fgr[order(dat_fgr$pred), ]

# A 5 años----
horizon <- 5

# Add estimated risk and complementary log-log of it to dataset
vdata$pred <- vdata$risk5y
pred <- as.matrix(vdata$pred)
vdata$cll_pred <- log(-log(1 - pred))

# 5 knots seems to give somewhat equivalent graph to pseudo method with bw = 0.05
n_internal_knots <- 5 # Austin et al. advise to use between 3 (more smoothing, less flexible) and 5 (less smoothing, more flexible)
rcs_vdata <- ns(vdata$cll_pred, df = n_internal_knots + 1)
colnames(rcs_vdata) <- paste0("basisf_", colnames(rcs_vdata))
vdata_bis <- cbind.data.frame(vdata, rcs_vdata)

# Use subdistribution hazards (Fine-Gray) model
form_fgr <- reformulate(
  termlabels = colnames(rcs_vdata),
  response = "Hist(time5y, eventd5y)"
)

# Regress subdistribution of event of interest on cloglog of estimated risks
calib_fgr <- FGR(
  formula = form_fgr,
  cause = primary_event,
  data = vdata_bis
)

# Add observed and predicted together in a data frame
dat_fgr <- cbind.data.frame(
  "obs" = predict(calib_fgr, times = horizon, newdata = vdata_bis),
  "pred" = vdata$pred
)

# Calibration plot
dat_fgr5b <- dat_fgr[order(dat_fgr$pred), ]

par(xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", las = 1, mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(
  x = dat_fgr2$pred,
  y = dat_fgr2$obs,
  type = "l",
  xlim = c(0, 1),
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  xlab = "Predictions",
  ylab = "Observed outcome proportion",
  bty = "n"
)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = "dashed", col = "red")
title("Calibration plot - 2 year KFRE\n(Stages 3-4)")

plot(
  x = dat_fgr5$pred,
  y = dat_fgr5$obs,
  type = "l",
  xlim = c(0, 1),
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  xlab = "Predictions",
  ylab = "Observed outcome proportion",
  bty = "n"
)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = "dashed", col = "red")
title("Calibration plot - 5 year KFRE\n(Stages 3-4)")

plot(
  x = dat_fgr2b$pred,
  y = dat_fgr2b$obs,
  type = "l",
  xlim = c(0, 1),
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  xlab = "Predictions",
  ylab = "Observed outcome proportion",
  bty = "n"
)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = "dashed", col = "red")
title("Calibration plot - 2 year KFRE\n(Stages 3b-4)")

plot(
  x = dat_fgr5b$pred,
  y = dat_fgr5b$obs,
  type = "l",
  xlim = c(0, 1),
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  xlab = "Predictions",
  ylab = "Observed outcome proportion",
  bty = "n"
)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = "dashed", col = "red")
title("Calibration plot - 5 year KFRE\n(Stages 3b-4)")
```

## Tablas suplementarias

### Tabla S1 {#sec-tableS1}

```{r}
#| label: table-S1
data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage == "Stages 3-4") %>% 
  mutate(
    primary_event = case_when(
      eventd5ylab == "Kidney Failure" ~ "Kidney failure", 
      eventd5ylab %in% c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", "Death w/o Kidney Failure") 
      ~ "No kidney failure"), 
    primary_event = factor(primary_event, 
                           levels = c("No kidney failure", 
                                      "Kidney failure"))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(total, sex, age, acr_cat, grf_cat, crea, eGFR_mdrd, acr, 
                urine_album, urine_crea, hta, dm, bmi, album35, hemog, 
                sbp_control, dbp_control, ckd_class, death5y, eventd5ylab,  
                primary_event) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = "primary_event", 
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", 
    "{min}, {max}"
  ),
  digits = list(all_continuous() ~ c(1, 1, 1, 1), 
                all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>% 
  bold_labels() -> tab2


data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage == "Stages 3-4") %>% 
  mutate(
    primary_event = case_when(
      eventd2ylab == "Kidney Failure" ~ "Kidney failure", 
      eventd2ylab %in% c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", "Death w/o Kidney Failure") 
      ~ "No kidney failure"), 
    primary_event = factor(primary_event, 
                           levels = c("No kidney failure", 
                                      "Kidney failure"))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(total, sex, age, acr_cat, grf_cat, crea, eGFR_mdrd, acr, 
                urine_album, urine_crea, hta, dm, bmi, album35, hemog, 
                sbp_control, dbp_control, ckd_class, death2y, eventd2ylab,  
                primary_event) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = "primary_event", 
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", 
    "{min}, {max}"
  ),
  digits = list(all_continuous() ~ c(1, 1, 1, 1), 
                all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>% 
  bold_labels() -> tab1

tbl_merge(list(tab1, tab2), 
          tab_spanner = c("2-years", "5-years")) %>% 
  modify_caption("Table S1. Baseline characteristics of the study patients at CKD Stages 3a, 3b or 4 for all predictors, stratified by outcome at 2- and 5-years") -> tab


tab %>% 
  as_flex_table() %>% 
  flextable::save_as_docx(path = "Tables/TableS1.docx")

tab %>% 
  gtsummary::as_kable_extra() %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling("striped")
```

### Tabla S2 {#sec-tableS2}

```{r}
#| label: table-S2
data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage2 == "Stages 3b-4") %>% 
  mutate(
    primary_event = case_when(
      eventd5ylab == "Kidney Failure" ~ "Kidney failure", 
      eventd5ylab %in% c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", "Death w/o Kidney Failure") 
      ~ "No kidney failure"), 
    primary_event = factor(primary_event, 
                           levels = c("No kidney failure", 
                                      "Kidney failure"))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(total, sex, age, acr_cat, grf_cat, crea, eGFR_mdrd, acr, 
                urine_album, urine_crea, hta, dm, bmi, album35, hemog, 
                sbp_control, dbp_control, ckd_class, death5y, eventd5ylab,  
                primary_event) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = "primary_event", 
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", 
    "{min}, {max}"
  ),
  digits = list(all_continuous() ~ c(1, 1, 1, 1), 
                all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>% 
  bold_labels() -> tab2


data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage == "Stages 3-4") %>% 
  mutate(
    primary_event = case_when(
      eventd2ylab == "Kidney Failure" ~ "Kidney failure", 
      eventd2ylab %in% c("Alive w/o Kidney Failure", "Death w/o Kidney Failure") 
      ~ "No kidney failure"), 
    primary_event = factor(primary_event, 
                           levels = c("No kidney failure", 
                                      "Kidney failure"))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(total, sex, age, acr_cat, grf_cat, crea, eGFR_mdrd, acr, 
                urine_album, urine_crea, hta, dm, bmi, album35, hemog, 
                sbp_control, dbp_control, ckd_class, death2y, eventd2ylab,  
                primary_event) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = "primary_event", 
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", 
    "{min}, {max}"
  ),
  digits = list(all_continuous() ~ c(1, 1, 1, 1), 
                all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>% 
  bold_labels() -> tab1

tbl_merge(list(tab1, tab2), 
          tab_spanner = c("2-years", "5-years")) %>% 
  modify_caption("Table S1. Baseline characteristics of the study patients at CKD Stages 3b or 4 for all predictors, stratified by outcome at 2- and 5-years") -> tab

tab %>% 
  as_flex_table() %>% 
  flextable::save_as_docx(path = "Tables/TableS2.docx")

tab %>% 
  gtsummary::as_kable_extra() %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling("striped")
```

### Tabla S3 {#sec-tableS3}

```{r}
#| label: table-S3

data %>%  
  dplyr::select(total, sex, age, acr_cat, grf_cat, ckd_class, crea, eGFR_ckdepi, acr, 
                urine_album, urine_crea, hta, dm, bmi, album35, hemog, 
                sbp_control, dbp_control, death2y, eventd2ylab, death5y, eventd5ylab) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = grf_cat, 
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({p25} - {p75})", 
    "{min} - {max}"
  ),
  digits = list(all_continuous() ~ c(1, 1, 1, 1), 
                all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>% 
  # add_p() %>% 
  bold_labels() %>% 
  modify_caption("Table S3. Baseline characteristics of the study population according CKD Stages") -> tabS3

tabS3 %>% 
  as_flex_table() %>% 
  flextable::save_as_docx(path = "Tables/TableS3.docx")

tabS3 %>% 
  gtsummary::as_kable_extra() %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling("striped")
```

### Tabla S4 {#sec-tableS4}

```{r}
#| label: table-S4-code

data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage == "Stages 3-4") %>% 
  dplyr::select(cas) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({min}, {max})"
  ),
  digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  percent = "row"
  ) %>%
  bold_labels() -> tab1a

data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage2 == "Stages 3b-4") %>% 
  dplyr::select(cas) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({min}, {max})"
  ),
  digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  percent = "row"
  ) %>%
  bold_labels() -> tab1b

data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage == "Stages 3-4") %>% 
  dplyr::select(cas, eventd5ylab) %>%  
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = "eventd5ylab",   
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({min}, {max})"
  ),
  digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  percent = "row"
  ) %>%  
  bold_labels() -> tab2a

data %>%  
  filter(ckd_stage2 == "Stages 3b-4") %>% 
  dplyr::select(cas, eventd5ylab) %>%  
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
  by = "eventd5ylab",   
  type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ c(
    "{mean} ({sd})",
    "{median} ({min}, {max})"
  ),
  digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)), 
  percent = "row"
  ) %>%  
  bold_labels() -> tab2b

tbl_merge(list(tab1a, tab2a, tab1b, tab2b), 
          tab_spanner = c("Overall", "Outcome", "Overall", "Outcome")) %>% 
  modify_caption("Table S4. Baseline characteristics of the study population according CKD Stages") -> tab

tab %>% 
  as_flex_table() %>% 
  theme_booktabs() %>%  
  bold(bold = TRUE, part = "header") %>% 
  add_header_row(
    values = c("", "CKD Stages 3a-3b-4", "CKD Stages 3a-3b-4"), 
    colwidths = c(1, 4, 4)
  ) %>% 
  flextable::save_as_docx(path = "Tables/TableS3.docx")
```

```{r}
#| label: table-S4
tab %>% 
  gtsummary::as_kable_extra() %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" ", "CKD Stages 3a-3b-4" = 4, "CKD Stages 3b-4" = 4)) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling("striped")
```

### Tabla S5 {#sec-tableS5}

```{r}
#| label: table-S5

kable(
  res_ci, 
  row.names = TRUE, 
  caption = "Table S5. Cumulative incidence of Renal Failure by CKD Stages"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", position = "center") %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Stages 3a-3b-4" = 3, "Stages 3b-4" = 3))
```

### Tabla S6 {#sec-tableS6}

## Extras

::: panel-tabset
## 

## Glimpse

Se observa un resumen general del conjunto de datos con sus variables:

```{r}
#| label: view-data2
#| output: true
#| echo: true

glimpse(data)
```

## Skim

Asimismo, una exploración general de las principales medidas de resumen de cada variable del conjunto de datos:

```{r}
#| label: resume-data
#| column: page
#| echo: true

skim(data)
```

## Ticket de Reprocubilidad

```{r}
#| label: repro_ticket
#| column: page
#| echo: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::
